title: [ExportVerilog] Improve begin/end omission heuristic
body:
The heuristic for omitting begin/end markers is currently very simple.  We omit the marker in this IR:

```
 %c42 = rtl.constant (42 : i42) : i42
  sv.if %cond {
    sv.bpassign %wire42, %c42 : i42
  }
```

But not for this IR:

```
  sv.if %cond {
    %c42 = rtl.constant (42 : i42) : i42
    sv.bpassign %wire42, %c42 : i42
  }
```

The heuristic (in `emitBeginEndRegion`) should look to see if all but one of the ops is a subexpression that will be inlined by the printer.
